summary: Decent audience recording with noticeable cuts and crowd chatter; no specific musical highlights mentioned
review: This tape offers a respectable snapshot of the concert for its era, but each set is incomplete and contains audible gaps. The audience‑sourced recording captures a good amount of crowd noise, making it only fairly listenable, and reviewers did not point out any standout performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief 3‑star review; recording is average with cuts, while no musical performance details are provided, leading to a neutral overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Decent for the period but each set has cuts and significant crowd chatter; incomplete sets reduce listening clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are incomplete with many song cuts, offering a fragmented view of the concert.
